summary.text: Formatted, consent-aware adapter for local development — logs the built
envelope (sanitized properties included) to the console.

Production transport: debounced batching, exponential-backoff retries, and
bfcache-safe delivery.

- Buffers events and POSTs a batch once

; a
  batch that never lands is re-queued.

are no-ops without consent; the buffer is purged on

) so instrumented code
